KeysToEntries.Hat_BoonieHat_Sand_Description: A boonie hat, also known as a bush hat, is a wide-brimmed hat designed for military and outdoor use. It provides protection from sun and rain and includes an adjustable chin strap for a secure fit.

KeysToEntries.Hat_Beret_Black_Description: Similar to the red beret, the black beret is worn by military forces all around the world, but sadly is not as famous as its more vivid sibling.
KeysToEntries.Hat_Beret_BossMB_Description:
The beret is possibly one of the most well-known types of headwear. It is worn by many military and police forces worldwide.

This beret belongs to Arkady "Buran" Vititsky, the military commander of Fort Narith.
KeysToEntries.Hat_Beret_BossTB_Description:
The beret is possibly one of the most well-known types of headwear. It is worn by many military and police forces worldwide.

This beret belongs to Palani "Colonel" Ketthavong, the military commander of Tiger Bay.
KeysToEntries.Hat_Beret_BossRS_Description:
The beret is possibly one of the most well-known types of headwear. It is worn by many military and police forces worldwide.

This beret belongs to Bane "Yen" Seeha, the military commander of Midnight Sapphire.
